strategy: Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+15%); avoid Fire, Ice, and Storm (45% resist).
Every 4th round she steals ALL your positive charms and wards — set up and land your hit before round 4 (or right after a steal on round 5+).

Don't trap her: any trap buffs all her minions (+30% damage, +20% accuracy, +10% pierce, +30% healing), and Feint additionally makes her Cleanse Ward herself. Protect a Feint with Indemnity if you must, otherwise rely on blades.
She's low health (5,045) — blade up fast and burst her before the round-4 steal.
AoE to hit her and the Clockwork minions together.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get Mana Burned — join on time.
She summons a Clockworker at the start, and more minions if more than two wizards are present.
Every 4th round she strips all your positive charms and wards — hit before round 4.
Put a Feint on her and she Cleanse Wards herself, then runs the trap-buff cheat below — use Indemnity or skip Feint.
Any trap on her buffs all her minions with damage, accuracy, pierce, and healing charms — don't trap her.
